omitted_declarations.policy_reference: If you leave a public review for a Partner (or any of their products in their shop on our Services), your rating, review, review date, and first name and last initial will be published on Fresha. Other Fresha users and members of the public may be able to see your reviews. Reviews may be published or syndicated on third party websites. Public reviews will survive the termination or expiry of the Fresha Terms of service.
